title: Adding a confirmation message before removing a channel with the ✕ would help prevent accidental deletions.

posts.author: RyotaroTakano (Ryotaro Takano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In the channel registration screen, pressing the ✕ removes a channel immediately. Since it can be deleted by mistake, it would be helpful to show a confirmation message like “Are you sure you want to delete this channel?” before removal.

What are you trying to achieve

We want to prevent accidental channel deletions and make the process safer for users.
